checklist: Building with LLMs to solve real problems
jd_text: Job description AI Engineering  You’ve been using AI for everything, to do school work, to write code, and to learn anything you ever want to learn. But how does AI actually create massive value in the real world? Here’s your chance to learn firsthand from the best and join a seasoned AI team building innovative AI to improve our healthcare system for everyone.  Company: Pretty Good AI — we build voice AI agents for healthcare practices to take calls 24/7, so patients can access information, book appointments, request medication refills, process faxes, and do many other things, anytime when they have the need. We’ve taken millions of patient calls just a few months after launch. Our customers see us as the only indispensable technology vendor. Customers love us; we are a 5-star, popular Voice AI for athenaOne practices.  Role (contractor): Build real production features in our voice AI platform, working directly with the founders and some of the best AI engineers in the valley, not buried in a big team. You'll work with production code from week one and learn everything by doing. You will learn more in the first month than in your entire last year.  What you'll do  Build and improve voice AI agents that handle real patient calls Build API integrations and validation tools for healthcare systems Develop features using Python & Typescript Use AI-assisted development tools daily (Cursor, Claude Code) as core workflow Ship production code in a fast iteration environment What we're looking for  Extreme curiosity and a fast learner Strong foundation in Python and Typescript Experience in building with LLM to solve real problems Self-starter mentality: you figure things out, you don't wait to be told what to do Comfortable asking questions; working with ambiguity and moving fast Able to adapt and learn from mistakes Nice to have: prior experience in technical roles Schedule & compensation  30–45+ hours/week, flexible around classes or your schedule Must reside in the USA and be authorized to work. $25/hour Remote OK What success looks like  Production code in our platform within your first week You'll learn healthcare systems, voice AI architecture, and startup engineering practices You'll have real patients depending on the code you wrote Previous interns have transitioned into full-time operations, data, and AI engineering roles How to apply: Submit your Handshake profile/resume and include 2–3 sentences on why building AI for healthcare interests you. Tell us one thing you learned in the last three months using AI. Only highly qualified applicants will be invited to our AI Engineering Challenge.  Start date: ASAP, with potential to extend or convert.  Equal Opportunity: We welcome applicants from all backgrounds.
